titleStmt.title: SII 9.411: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 411. (A.R. No. 246 of 1913.) ON A STONE IN FRONT OF THE NANDI-MANDAPA OF THE DODDAPADESVARA TEMPLE AT MODALLI, KOLLEGAL TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 12[8]8, Parābhava, Chaitra, ba. 10, Mam[galavāra]. In Parābhava, Chaitra ba. 10 was a Sunday = April 5, A.D. 1366. In Viśvāvasu, however, the tithi fell on a Tuesday = A.D. 1365 April 15. The inscription refers itself to the reign of Kampaṇṇa-Oḍeya, son of Vīra-Bukkaṇṇa-Oḍeya. It records that during the administration of Perumāḷa-Bhaṭṭa, a certain Nāyaka made a gift of land and a part of toll revenue of the villages Baṇḍehaḷḷi and Mōḍehaḷḷi, with the consent of the nāḍu, nagara and nānādēśis, for the service of the god Mallināthadēva of Mōḍehaḷḷi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēsva
raṁ catussamudrādhipati Arirāyavibhāḍa bhā
ṣagatapuvarāyaragaṁḍa śrīvīrabukkaṇnaOḍeyara
kumāra kaṁpaṇnaOḍeyaru prituvīrājyaṁgeyu
ttire sakhavaruṣa 1288 saṁ vartamāna parābhavasaṁ
vatsarada caitra ba 10 maṁ śrīmatu baṁḍehaḷi
mōḍehaḷḷiya śrīmallināthadēvarige sōva
nāykara dharmma perumāḷabhaṭara Ādhikāradali
muḍigoṁḍacōḷapurada Ācārya koṁḍapa
gōpaṇasamudravumaṁ baṁ haḷi
nāḍa samastanānādēśigaḷu duggivūra
da paṭṭaṇa hattiha hadineṁṭu goḷaga
Eraḍunāḍu nāḍū nagaramū samastaruṁ
śrīmallināthadēvarige koṭṭa dēvarāyada dharma
I dinadalu māḍida kaṭṭu mūḍe voṁdu
bhatta bha 1 kkaṁ herjuṁkaṁ puṇse nele niṁda
ṇiṁda baha meṇasina bhāra
kka ga 1 Aḍikeya hēṟu hattakkaṁ
daḷake prahara hēṟu 1 kaṁ dalli

devasada hēṟu Āḷige mūhēṟu 1 kaṁ
hu 1 saṁtheya Ābaḷi kuḍu ttu I
I mariyādege I mūru paṭṭaṇa Oḷa
gāda hadineṁṭu paṭṭaṇavu mārgganāḍū nagara
vū kūḍi Oḍaṁbaṭṭu śrīmallināthadēvarige koṭṭa
dharmaśāśana I dharmmadali Ādaddu dēvarige saṁdu
bahudu Idallade I ṁge Āvanoba Aḍḍi
māḍidavanu śrīgaṁgeyalu gōvadhe brāhmaṇavadhe
māḍida pāpake hōharu . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ
vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . saṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi vi
ṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī
śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.411 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
